name: hunter
description: Provider-powered career workflows for profiles, opportunities, applications, relationships, and pursuits.

interface.shortDescription: Manage careers with the tools already available
interface.longDescription: Use the host's available intelligence, context, and tools to manage independent career profiles, discover and pursue work, create materials, develop relationships, and maintain portable continuity.
defaultPrompt: Set me up from my career files and manage the next steps.
Find and pursue the best opportunities for this profile.
Use the tools available here to move my career forward.
